description: Shared correctness fixtures (docs/benchmark-correctness-fixtures.md). Both languages build chase tables with the identical xorshift64+Sattolo algorithm; traversalChecksum/traversal_checksum over the full cycle must produce exactly these values in BOTH suites — proving byte-identical datasets across Java and Rust. Change a value here only together with both test files.
checksumAlgorithm: follow next[] from index 0 for size steps; checksum = checksum*31 + idx with 64-bit wrapping
